title: Improved Vanilla
description: adds small new features to Minecraft Vanilla like easy farming / easy crop planting / mineable spawners / ...
body:
Improved Vanilla

adds some small features to Vanilla Minecraft to make the gameplay a little bit more pleasant/enjoyable


features added:

  • spawners are mineable with silk-touch pickaxes
  • spawners drop the spawn-egg of the displayed entity
  • mobs can drop their spawn-egg at a 2% chance
  • right-click crops to harvest them
  • added recipes for items that are not craftable by default (see the wiki for more information)
  • right-clicking with seeds will fill the farmland in a small radius (gif below)

everything can be adjusted/deactivated with the config


if you have any questions about the mod, or you want a few insights about upcoming features:
feel free to join the Discord       link
